San Francisco's Door & Window Experts

Premium installation and replacement services. Protecting your view, one window at a time.

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Crafting Quality in Every Frame

Custom Doors Co was founded over a decade ago with a simple goal: to provide San Francisco homeowners and businesses with unparalleled window and door solutions. We started as a small, family-run operation, and while we've grown, our commitment to quality craftsmanship and personalized service remains unchanged.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our window and door installer services.

How long does window installation typically take?

The duration of window installation depends on the number of windows and the complexity of the project. A typical installation can take anywhere from a few hours to a few days.

What type of windows are best for San Francisco's climate?

Windows with Low-E coatings and argon gas fills are ideal for San Francisco's climate, as they provide excellent insulation and UV protection. Vinyl and fiberglass frames are also durable and weather-resistant.

Do you offer a warranty on your window installations?

Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on both our materials and workmanship. Please contact us for specific details regarding our warranty coverage.

Reviews From Our Window And Door Installer Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Custom Doors Co replaced all the windows in my Victorian home in the Mission District. They were incredibly respectful of the original architecture and did a fantastic job matching the new windows to the existing style. The team was professional, efficient, and cleaned up everything thoroughly. Highly recommend!"

Maria S. Window Replacement

"Had Custom Doors Co install a new front door in my condo in North Beach. The installation was quick, and the door looks great. There was a slight delay in getting the hardware, but they communicated clearly throughout the process. Overall, a good experience."

David K. Door Installation

"We hired Custom Doors Co to install a new sliding patio door in our Sunset District home. They did an amazing job! The door slides smoothly, and the new weatherstripping has made a huge difference in keeping the fog out. The installers were friendly and professional."

Jennifer L. Patio Door Installation
